title: orthochilus distans
intro: Orthochilus distans, also known as the spreading orchid, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Orthochilus distans include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory problems, and acting as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and other common ailments.
